message:
style: apply rustfmt formatting across web, learn, export, simulation modules

Reformat long lines, import ordering, closure argument layout, and
assertion macro arguments to satisfy rustfmt defaults. Replace
> 0 length check with !is_empty() in export tests (clippy). Replace
unnecessary r#"..."# raw string with r"..." in simulation tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
